description: 1. 85% polyester/15% cotton t-shirt with an extra smooth finish 2. Athletic Fit with pigment print cat graphic on left chest 3. Printed puma cat logo on left sleeve 4. Straight hemline   5. short sleeves 6. Red Colour The puma Cat t-shirt has a casual style and a great look. Enjoy the lightness and comfort as you try it on. The Puma cat graphic on the t-shirt will remind you of its lineage.    t-shirts or &ldquo Tees&rdquo as they are called have become an essential part of our dressing. No one really has remained untouched by the influence of t-shirts. The comfort, ease of use and variety that a t-shirt offers makes it the most preferred casual wear. It goes well with jeans, pants, shorts &ndash almost anything that one can think of. There are t-shirts available in various fits and sizes for men of all ages. While doing your everyday activities, as daily wear or as Friday dressing to office, there's a none better choice than a t-shirt. T-shirts also come with terrific designs on it and are available in various colours. Feel good, feel light and have a great time as your slip into your very own t-shirt.   Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in T-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
